channel.title: Lunal Graphics Blog
channel.description: Free digital art tools — Photoshop and Photopea plugins.

item.title: [PLEASE READ] LUNAL GRAPHICS IS GOING OPEN SOURCE
item.description: The biggest news from Lunal Graphics in the last two years. Learn what this entails.

item.title: Photopea Playground
item.description: An interactive playground for experimenting with the Photopea scripting API.

item.title: Installing/Deleting .deb Packages on Linux
item.description: A quick guide on how to install and remove .deb packages on Linux.

item.title: Installing Plugins in Photopea
item.description: Step-by-step guide to installing Lunal Graphics plugins in Photopea.

item.title: New Site, New Blog
item.description: Introducing the new Lunal Graphics website and blog.
